title: Timeless Textures
description: A Texture Pack for Minecraft 1.0 . It aims to create a visually appealing and consistent theme for the game. This pack has a silly and saturated vibe!
body:
# What is Timeless Textures?
Timeless Textures is a Texture Pack that aims to create a **consistent** theme across all textures in the game. It accomplishes that by retexturing existing textures instead of creating completely new and different ones. 

# What Things Have Been Textured?
- **Everything in** the **items.png**
- **Practically every** possible **block**
- **Every armor overlay** (except for unused ones lol)
- Background.png
- **Everything** in the item folder (It contains block/item entities lmao)
- **Everything** in the gui folder (Every single interface and more!)

It is important to mention that **this pack is work in progress**. So not everything is textured yet. However, almost all of the blocks and items in the game has been texturized except for a few. (nether portal block, end portal block...)

## Textures That Aren't Coming
- Still Water (I don't want to break consistency with flowing water)
- Still Lava (I don't want to break consistency with flowing lava)
- Flowing Water (impossible without mods for 1.0)
- Flowing Lava (impossible without mods for 1.0)
- Nether Portal Block (impossible without mods for 1.0)
- End Portal Block (impossible without mods for 1.0)
- Compass (impossible without mods for 1.0)
- Clock (impossible without mods for 1.0)
- Fire block & overlay (impossible without mods for 1.0)
- fonts (I tried to change them but it didn't work)
